questions.question: Interior Decoration ka primary goal kya hai?

options.A: Space ko functional aur aesthetically pleasing banana
options.B: Sirf expensive items use karna

questions.explanation: Interior decoration ka mukhya uddeshya kisi bhi jagah ko upyogi (functional) aur sundar (aesthetically pleasing) banana hota hai.

questions.question: Worksite par safety gloves pehenna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Haathon ko chemicals aur sharp objects se bachane ke liye
options.C: Kaam ko slow karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Safety gloves haathon ko chemical exposure, cuts aur abrasions se surakshit rakhte hain jo construction site par common hain.

questions.question: Measuring tape ka sahi istemal kya hai?

options.B: Sirf golai napna
options.C: Length, width aur height ko accurately measure karna

questions.explanation: Measuring tape ka upyog kisi bhi surface ya space ki lambai, चौड़ाई aur ऊंचाई ko 정확ता se mapne ke liye kiya jata hai.

questions.question: PPE (Personal Protective Equipment) mein kya shamil nahi hai?

options.B: Safety Goggles

questions.explanation: PPE vyaktiगत suraksha upkaran hote hain jo workers ko hazards se bachate hain. Mobile phone iska hissa nahi hai.

questions.question: Ek achha interior decorator banane ke liye kis quality ki sabse zyada zaroorat hai?

options.B: Client ki requirements ko samajhna
options.C: Sirf apne ideas ko enforce karna

questions.explanation: Ek successful interior decorator banane ke liye client ki needs aur preferences ko samajhna aur unhe design mein shamil karna bahut important hai.

questions.question: Site par electrical wiring ka kaam karte waqt kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Main power supply off karna

questions.explanation: Electrical work shuru karne se pehle hamesha main power supply ko band karna chahiye taaki electric shock se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: First Aid kit ka kya upyog hai construction site par?

options.B: Minor injuries ka turant ilaaj karne ke liye

questions.explanation: First Aid kit chot lagne ya minor medical emergencies mein turant treatment provide karne ke liye hoti hai.

questions.question: Ek floor plan ko padhte waqt, walls ko kis symbol se represent kiya jata hai?

options.B: Thick solid lines

questions.explanation: Floor plans mein walls ko aam taur par thick solid lines se dikhaya jata hai taaki unhe easily identify kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Client brief mein kya information shamil hoti hai?

options.B: Client ki needs, budget aur timeline

questions.explanation: Client brief mein client ki zaroorat, budget, project ka time frame aur unki expectations jaise important details hoti hain.

questions.question: Agar koi worker site par gir jaye aur use chot lag jaye, toh pehla kadam kya hona chahiye?

options.B: First Aid provide karna aur senior ko inform karna

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi site injury mein, sabse pehle First Aid dena aur phir turant supervisor ya senior ko inform karna chahiye.

questions.question: Scale ruler ka use kis liye kiya jata hai?

options.B: Drawings ko proportionate size mein measure karne ke liye
options.C: Walls ko level karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Scale ruler drawings aur blueprints par measurements ko real-world dimensions mein convert karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Ek project ki shuruat mein site survey kyun important hai?

options.B: Existing structure aur dimensions ko samajhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Site survey se existing space ki exact measurements, structure aur potential challenges ka pata chalta hai, jo design process ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Fire extinguisher ka sahi istemal kaise karte hain?

options.B: Sirf uski taraf dekhna
options.C: PASS method (Pull, Aim, Squeeze, Sweep) ka use karna

questions.explanation: Fire extinguisher ka use PASS method (Pull the pin, Aim at the base of the fire, Squeeze the handle, Sweep side to side) se kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Levelling instrument (jaise spirit level) ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Surfaces ko horizontal ya vertical plane mein check karna

questions.explanation: Spirit level surfaces ki levelness (horizontal) aur plumbness (vertical) ko check karne ke liye use hota hai, jo precise work ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Good housekeeping practices ka matlab kya hai construction site par?

options.B: Site ko saaf, organized aur hazard-free rakhna
options.C: Tools ko kahin bhi chhod dena

questions.explanation: Good housekeeping se site par accidents kam hote hain aur efficiency badhti hai. Isme safai aur vyavastha shamil hai.

questions.question: Client ko project ke progress ke bare mein regularly inform karna kyun important hai?

options.B: Transparency maintain karne aur trust build karne ke liye
options.C: Apna time waste karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Regular communication client ke saath transparency banaye rakhti hai aur unka trust jeetne mein madad karti hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko kisi tool ko operate karna nahi aata, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Kisi experienced person se help ya training lena
options.C: Usko use karna band kar dena

questions.explanation: Safety aur sahi kaam ke liye, agar kisi tool ka istemal nahi aata toh hamesha kisi experienced person se seekhna chahiye.

questions.question: Colour wheel par primary colors kaun se hain?

options.B: Red, Blue, Yellow

questions.explanation: Primary colors (Red, Blue, Yellow) woh colors hain jinhe kisi aur color ko mix karke nahi banaya ja sakta, aur baki sab colors inhi se bante hain.

questions.question: Design element 'Line' ka kya matlab hai interior design mein?

options.B: Do points ko jodne wala path ya shape ka outline

questions.explanation: Line design ka ek fundamental element hai jo do points ko connect karta hai aur direction, movement aur structure define karta hai.

questions.question: Secondary colors kaise bante hain?

options.A: Ek primary color ko white se mix karke
options.B: Do primary colors ko mix karke
options.C: Black aur white ko mix karke
options.D: Teen primary colors ko mix karke

questions.explanation: Secondary colors (Orange, Green, Purple) do primary colors ko equal proportions mein mix karne se bante hain.

questions.question: 'Balance' design principle ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Visual stability aur equilibrium create karna
options.C: Sirf ek hi color use karna

questions.explanation: Balance design mein visual weight ko distribute karta hai, jisse space mein stability aur harmony aati hai.

questions.question: Warm colors kaun se hain aur unka effect kya hota hai?

options.B: Red, Orange, Yellow - energetic aur inviting effect

questions.explanation: Warm colors jaise red, orange, yellow space ko energetic, cozy aur inviting feel dete hain.

questions.question: Design element 'Texture' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Surface ki feel (rough, smooth, soft, hard)

questions.explanation: Texture ek surface ki physical ya visual quality hoti hai jo uski feel ya appearance ko describe karti hai.

questions.question: Analogous colour scheme mein kaun se colors use hote hain?

options.A: Opposite colors on the colour wheel
options.B: Teen colors jo colour wheel par ek doosre ke bagal mein hote hain
options.C: Sirf ek hi color ke different shades

questions.explanation: Analogous scheme mein colour wheel par ek doosre ke paas wale colors use hote hain, jo ek harmonious aur soothing look dete hain.

questions.question: Monochromatic colour scheme kya hai?

options.A: Kai alag alag colors ka use
options.B: Ek hi color ke various shades, tints aur tones ka use
options.C: Sirf black aur white ka use

questions.explanation: Monochromatic scheme mein ek single color ke alag-alag variations (shades, tints, tones) ka use hota hai, jo ek unified look deta hai.

questions.question: Design element 'Form' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: 3D shape of an object or space

questions.explanation: Form kisi bhi object ya space ki 3D shape ko refer karta hai, jaise ek cube, sphere ya room ka overall structure.

questions.question: Emphasis design principle ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Ek focal point create karna jo attention attract kare

questions.explanation: Emphasis design mein ek particular element ya area ko highlight karta hai, jisse woh focal point ban jata hai aur room mein interest create karta hai.

questions.question: Cool colors ka kya effect hota hai space par?

options.B: Calm, soothing aur spacious feel

questions.explanation: Cool colors (blue, green, purple) generally calm, soothing aur relaxing effect dete hain, aur space ko bada dikha sakte hain.

questions.question: Rhythm design principle ko kaise achieve kiya jata hai?

options.A: Sirf ek hi cheez use karke
options.B: Elements ko repeat, alternate ya progressively arrange karke

questions.explanation: Rhythm design mein movement aur visual flow create karta hai, jo elements ke repetition, alternation ya progression se hasil hota hai.

questions.question: Complementary colour scheme kya hai?

options.A: Colour wheel par bagal wale colors
options.B: Colour wheel par ek doosre ke opposite colors
options.C: Ek hi color ke different shades
options.D: Teen colors jo ek triangle banate hain

questions.explanation: Complementary colors colour wheel par ek doosre ke opposite hote hain aur jab saath mein use hote hain toh high contrast aur vibrancy create karte hain.

questions.question: Space design element ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Room mein available area, filled (positive) ya empty (negative)

questions.explanation: Space design mein room ke andar ki jagah ko refer karta hai, jismein furniture (positive space) aur khali area (negative space) dono shamil hain.

questions.question: Tint, Tone aur Shade mein kya difference hai?

options.A: Tint mein white add hota hai, Tone mein grey, Shade mein black
options.B: Tint mein black add hota hai, Tone mein white, Shade mein grey

questions.explanation: Tint original color mein white add karne se banta hai, Tone grey add karne se, aur Shade black add karne se banta hai. Ye colors ki lightness ya darkness ko change karte hain.

questions.question: Triadic colour scheme mein kaun se colors use hote hain?

options.B: Teen colors jo colour wheel par equally spaced hote hain

questions.explanation: Triadic scheme mein colour wheel par equally spaced teen colors use hote hain, jo ek vibrant aur balanced combination provide karte hain.

questions.question: Unity design principle ka kya role hai?

options.B: Sabhi design elements ko ek cohesive aur harmonious whole banana
options.D: Sirf ek hi material use karna

questions.explanation: Unity design mein sabhi elements ko ek saath bandhta hai, jisse room ek complete aur unified look deta hai.

questions.question: Distemper paint ki kya visheshta hai?

options.B: Economical aur water-based, kam durability

questions.explanation: Distemper ek water-based paint hai jo economical hota hai lekin emulsion jitna durable ya washable nahi hota.

questions.question: Emulsion paint ke benefits kya hain interior walls ke liye?

options.B: Quick drying, washable, good finish aur durability

questions.explanation: Emulsion paints jaldi sukhte hain, washable hote hain, aur ek smooth, durable finish dete hain, jo interiors ke liye ideal hain.

questions.question: Wallpaper lagane se pehle wall preparation mein kya shamil hai?

options.B: Walls ko smooth, clean, dry aur primed karna

questions.explanation: Sahi wall preparation (cleaning, smoothing, priming) wallpaper ki longevity aur finish ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Ceramic tiles ki kya khas baat hai flooring ke liye?

options.A: Bahut soft aur easily scratch ho jate hain
options.B: Durable, water-resistant aur easy to clean
options.D: High maintenance ki zaroorat hoti hai

questions.explanation: Ceramic tiles apni durability, water resistance aur easy maintenance ke karan flooring ke liye popular hain, especially wet areas mein.

questions.question: Laminate flooring ke advantages kya hain?

options.B: Scratch-resistant, easy to install aur cost-effective

questions.explanation: Laminate flooring cost-effective hota hai, scratch resistant hota hai aur comparatively easy to install hota hai, jo ise popular choice banata hai.

questions.question: Curtains ke liye fabric select karte samay kya consider karna chahiye?

options.B: Light control, privacy, durability aur style

questions.explanation: Curtain fabric selection mein light filtering, privacy level, room ka style aur fabric ki durability jaise factors important hain.

questions.question: Aapko wood par paint karne se pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Surface ko sand karna aur primer lagana

questions.explanation: Wood surface ko sand karne se paint achhe se chipakta hai, aur primer se finish smooth aur durable banti hai.

questions.question: Wall putty ka kya use hai painting se pehle?

options.B: Wall ki unevenness, cracks aur holes ko fill karke smooth surface banana

questions.explanation: Wall putty painting se pehle walls ki imperfections ko hide karke ek smooth aur even surface provide karti hai.

questions.question: Vinyl flooring ke benefits kya hain?

options.B: Water-resistant, durable, aur variety of designs mein available

questions.explanation: Vinyl flooring water-resistant, durable aur low-maintenance hota hai, jo ise kitchens aur bathrooms ke liye suitable banata hai.

questions.question: Drill machine ka primary use kya hai interior work mein?

options.B: Walls, wood ya metal mein holes banana

questions.explanation: Drill machine ka mukhya upyog alag-alag materials mein holes banane ke liye hota hai, jaise shelves install karna ya fixtures lagana.

questions.question: Sandpaper ka kya use hai interior decoration mein?

options.B: Surfaces ko smooth karna, purana paint hatana ya wood ko prepare karna

questions.explanation: Sandpaper surfaces ko rough se smooth banane, purani coatings hatane aur new finishes ke liye prepare karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Primer paint ka kya role hai?

options.A: Topcoat ke liye extra shine dena
options.B: Surface ko seal karna, paint adhesion badhana aur stain blocking

questions.explanation: Primer paint topcoat ke liye ek uniform base provide karta hai, adhesion badhata hai aur stains ko bleed through hone se rokta hai.

questions.question: Wallpaper adhesive lagate waqt kis tool ka use hota hai?

options.B: Paint brush

questions.explanation: Wallpaper brush ya roller adhesive ko evenly spread karne aur wallpaper ko smooth out karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Gypsum board (false ceiling ke liye) ke kya fayde hain?

options.A: Bahut heavy aur install karna mushkil
options.B: Lightweight, fire-resistant aur easy to install

questions.explanation: Gypsum board false ceilings ke liye popular hai kyuki yeh lightweight, fire-resistant hai aur isse smooth finish milta hai.

questions.question: Plywood ka use interior decoration mein kahan hota hai?

options.B: Furniture construction, paneling aur structural support
options.D: Wallpaper ke upar lagane ke liye

questions.explanation: Plywood apni strength aur versatility ke liye furniture, cabinetry, wall paneling aur anya structural applications mein use hota hai.

questions.question: Lacquered finish paint ki kya khas baat hai?

options.B: High gloss, durable aur water-resistant finish deta hai

questions.explanation: Lacquered finish ek high-gloss, hard aur durable surface provide karti hai jo water aur abrasion resistant hoti hai, often furniture par use hoti hai.

questions.question: Adhesive ka kya role hai wallpaper installation mein?

options.B: Wallpaper ko wall se firmly attach karna

questions.explanation: Adhesive wallpaper ko wall surface par chipkane ke liye use hota hai, jisse woh securely fix ho sake.

questions.question: POP ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Plaster of Paris

questions.explanation: POP ka full form Plaster of Paris hai, jo ek white powdery material hai.

questions.question: POP ko mix karte samay sahi ratio kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Zyada POP, kam paani
options.C: Sahi consistency ke liye POP ko paani mein dheere dheere milana

questions.explanation: POP ko mix karte samay, paani mein dheere-dheere POP powder dalna chahiye aur mix karte rehna chahiye taaki lumps na bane aur smooth paste bane.

questions.question: POP ka primary use kya hai interior decoration mein?

options.B: False ceilings, decorative cornices aur wall finishes banana

questions.explanation: POP ka mukhya upyog false ceilings, decorative mouldings, cornices aur artistic wall finishes banane mein hota hai.

questions.question: POP ki setting time ko kaise control kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Paani ki matra aur kuch additives (jaise retarder) ka use karke

questions.explanation: POP ki setting time ko paani ki matra, uske temperature aur chemical additives (accelerators ya retarders) se adjust kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: POP work ke liye kaun sa tool sabse zaroori hai?

options.B: Trowel (karni)

questions.explanation: Trowel (karni) POP ko apply karne, spread karne aur smooth karne ke liye ek essential tool hai.

questions.question: POP lagane se pehle wall surface ko kaise prepare karna chahiye?

options.B: Clean, dry aur rough banana (agar smooth ho toh)

questions.explanation: POP ki achhi adhesion ke liye surface ko saaf, sukha aur thoda rough hona chahiye, jisse POP us par achhe se chipak sake.

questions.question: POP ki curing process kya hai?

options.B: Usko dheere-dheere sukhne dena taaki strength badhe

questions.explanation: Curing process mein POP ko dheere-dheere sukhne dena shamil hai, jisse uski strength aur durability badhti hai, aur cracks kam hote hain.

questions.question: Agar POP mix mein lumps ban jaye toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Usko acche se mix karna ya naya mix banana

questions.explanation: Lumps wale POP mix se uneven finish aati hai. Ise ya toh acche se mix karna chahiye ya naya mix banana chahiye.

questions.question: POP false ceiling mein metal frame ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: POP sheets ko support dena aur structure provide karna

questions.explanation: Metal frame false ceiling ke liye structural support provide karta hai, jiske upar POP sheets ya gypsum sheets fix ki jati hain.

questions.question: POP ko smooth finish dene ke liye kaun sa step zaroori hai application ke baad?

options.B: Sanding karna

questions.explanation: POP ke sukhne ke baad, uski surface ko sandpaper se sand karna zaroori hai taaki ek smooth aur flawless finish mil sake.

questions.question: POP work ke liye safety goggles kyun important hain?

options.B: Aankhon ko dust particles aur POP splashes se bachane ke liye

questions.explanation: POP work karte samay dust aur material ke splashes se aankhon ko bachane ke liye safety goggles pehenna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: POP ki strength kis par depend karti hai?

options.B: Sahi mixing ratio, proper curing aur surface preparation par

questions.explanation: POP ki strength aur durability uske mixing ratio, curing conditions aur jis surface par lagaya ja raha hai uski preparation par nirbhar karti hai.

questions.question: POP cornices kya hote hain?

options.B: Walls aur ceiling ke junction par banaye gaye decorative mouldings

questions.explanation: POP cornices decorative mouldings hote hain jo room ki walls aur ceiling ke beech ke junction par lagaye jate hain, aesthetics badhane ke liye.

questions.question: POP work mein plumb bob ka kya use hai?

options.B: Vertical alignment (plumbness) check karne ke liye
options.C: Horizontal level check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Plumb bob ka use walls, frames ya anya vertical structures ki sidhai (plumbness) ko check karne ke liye kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Agar POP surface par chhota crack aa jaye toh use kaise repair kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Thoda sa naya POP mix lagakar aur smooth karke

questions.explanation: Minor cracks ko naye POP mix se fill karke aur phir sand karke aasani se repair kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: POP work karte samay ventilation kyun important hai?

options.B: Dust aur chemical fumes ko bahar nikalne ke liye
options.C: POP ko jaldi sukhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper ventilation dust particles aur POP se nikalne wale fumes ko disperse karta hai, jo worker ki health ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: POP ceiling rose kya hota hai?

options.B: Ceiling ke center mein lagaya jane wala decorative element, jahan chandelier lagta hai

questions.explanation: Ceiling rose ek circular ya decorative POP element hota hai jo ceiling ke center mein lagaya jata hai, jahan se light fixture ya chandelier latkaya jata hai.

questions.question: False ceiling ka primary benefit kya hai interior spaces mein?

options.B: Wiring, pipes aur AC ducts chhupana, insulation provide karna aur aesthetics badhana

questions.explanation: False ceilings wiring, plumbing, AC ducts ko chhupati hain, thermal aur acoustic insulation provide karti hain, aur room ki aesthetics ko enhance karti hain.

questions.question: Cove lighting kya hai aur iska kya effect hota hai?

options.A: Direct light jo aankhon ko chubhe
options.B: Hidden lighting jo ceiling ya wall se bounce hokar soft, indirect illumination deti hai

questions.explanation: Cove lighting mein light source chhupa hota hai, aur light wall ya ceiling se reflect hokar soft aur uniform illumination provide karti hai, jo ambience ke liye achhi hai.

questions.question: POP mein jali work banane ke liye kya technique use hoti hai?

options.B: Moulds ka use karke intricate patterns create karna

questions.explanation: POP jali work banane ke liye pre-made moulds ka use kiya jata hai jismein intricate patterns hote hain, jinhe POP se fill karke jali banaya jata hai.

questions.question: POP false ceiling mein recessed lights (downlights) install karte samay kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Lights ko kahin bhi laga dena
options.B: Sahi spacing, wiring aur heat dissipation ka dhyan rakhna

questions.explanation: Recessed lights ki sahi placement, electrical wiring ki safety aur heat buildup se bachne ke liye proper ventilation ya insulation bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: POP wall texture banane ke liye kaun si technique use ho sakti hai?

options.B: Trowel, sponge ya brush ka use karke different patterns create karna

questions.explanation: POP ko apply karne ke baad, trowel, sponge, brush ya even haathon se alag-alag techniques ka use karke textured finishes banayi ja sakti hain.

questions.question: Gypsum false ceiling aur POP false ceiling mein kya difference hai?

options.B: Gypsum pre-made boards hote hain, POP site par mix hota hai aur shape kiya jata hai
options.D: POP sirf walls ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Gypsum false ceilings pre-fabricated gypsum boards se banti hain, jabki POP false ceilings site par Plaster of Paris ko mix karke banayi jaati hain.

questions.question: POP work mein motifs aur medallions kya hote hain?

options.B: Decorative, often intricate designs jo walls ya ceilings par lagaye jate hain

questions.explanation: Motifs aur medallions POP ke bane hue decorative elements hote hain jo walls, ceilings ya cornices par aesthetic appeal badhane ke liye lagaye jate hain.

questions.question: POP surface par paint karne se pehle kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Surface ko achhe se dry, smooth aur primed karna

questions.explanation: POP surface ko paint karne se pehle usko poori tarah se sukha, smooth aur primer se coat karna chahiye taaki paint achhe se chipke aur finish acchi aaye.

questions.question: POP designs mein lighting strips (LED strips) integrate karne ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Ambient lighting, accent lighting provide karna aur design ko highlight karna

questions.explanation: LED strips POP designs mein ambient lighting, accent lighting provide karti hain aur design elements ko highlight karke room ki aesthetics ko enhance karti hain.

questions.question: Agar POP false ceiling mein moisture ki wajah se daag pad jaye toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Moisture source ko identify aur fix karna, phir daag ko clean aur repair karna

questions.explanation: Moisture damage ko repair karne se pehle, moisture source (jaise leak) ko theek karna zaroori hai, phir daag ko clean karke surface ko repair kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Cornice ke liye POP mouldings kaise banaye jate hain?

options.B: Pre-designed moulds mein POP mix daal kar aur set hone par nikal kar

questions.explanation: Cornice mouldings banane ke liye, POP mix ko specific design wale moulds mein daala jata hai aur set hone ke baad unhe nikal kar install kiya jata hai.

questions.question: POP ke saath fiberglass mesh ka use kyun kiya jata hai?

options.B: POP ki strength badhane aur crack formation ko rokne ke liye
options.C: Sirf color change karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Fiberglass mesh POP work mein reinforcement provide karta hai, jisse POP ki tensile strength badhti hai aur cracks aane ki sambhavna kam hoti hai.

questions.question: POP designs mein curves aur intricate shapes banane ke liye kaun si technique use hoti hai?

options.B: Flexi-moulds, templates aur freehand shaping ka use karna

questions.explanation: Intricate curves aur shapes banane ke liye flexi-moulds, custom templates aur skilled freehand shaping techniques ka use kiya jata hai.

questions.question: POP ceiling mein water damage ke kya signs ho sakte hain?

options.B: Yellowish/brownish stains, peeling paint, ya bulge

questions.explanation: Water damage ke signs mein discoloration (stains), paint ka chhilna, ya ceiling ka phoolna (bulging) shamil hain.

questions.question: POP work mein ornamental details ko sharp aur clean kaise rakhte hain?

options.B: Sahi moulds, careful application aur fine sanding ka use karke

questions.explanation: Ornamental details ki sharpness aur cleanliness maintain karne ke liye high-quality moulds, precise application aur detail-oriented finishing work zaroori hai.

questions.question: POP false ceiling mein electrical wiring ko kaise manage karte hain?

options.B: Conduits aur junction boxes ka use karke secure aur hidden tarike se install karna
options.C: POP ke andar mix kar dena

questions.explanation: Electrical wiring ko conduits mein chhipaya jata hai aur junction boxes ka use kiya jata hai taaki woh safe, accessible aur aesthetic ho.

questions.question: POP surface par crack filler ka use kyun kiya jata hai?

options.B: Chhote cracks aur imperfections ko fill karke smooth base provide karna

questions.explanation: Crack filler chhote cracks aur holes ko bharne ke liye use hota hai, jisse paint ya finish ke liye ek smooth aur uniform surface mil sake.

questions.question: Kisi bhi interior decoration project ka budget estimate banate samay kya factors consider karne chahiye?

options.B: Material cost, labour cost, transportation aur miscellaneous expenses

questions.explanation: Budget estimate mein materials, labour, transport, tools aur unforeseen expenses jaise sabhi factors ko shamil karna chahiye.

questions.question: Project timeline manage karne ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Project ko samay par complete karna, resources optimize karna aur delays avoid karna

questions.explanation: Effective timeline management se project time par complete hota hai, resources ka sahi istemal hota hai aur unexpected delays kam hote hain.

questions.question: Material quantity estimate karte samay kya zaroori hai?

options.B: Accurate measurements lena aur wastage factor ko consider karna

questions.explanation: Accurate measurements aur wastage factor ko dhyan mein rakhkar hi material quantity estimate karna chahiye taaki na toh kam pade aur na hi zyada waste ho.

questions.question: Client se clear communication kyun zaroori hai project ke dauran?

options.B: Expectations align karne, feedback lene aur misunderstandings avoid karne ke liye
options.C: Apna time waste karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Clear communication client ke saath trust banati hai, unki expectations ko manage karti hai aur project ko smooth chalati hai.

questions.question: Site par waste management ka kya importance hai?

options.A: Waste ko kahin bhi fek dena
options.B: Environment ko protect karna, site ko clean rakhna aur safety badhana

questions.explanation: Proper waste management se site saaf rehti hai, accidents kam hote hain aur environment par negative impact kam hota hai.

questions.question: Labour cost calculate karte samay kya factors dhyan mein rakhne chahiye?

options.A: Sirf din ke hisab se paise
options.B: Workers ki skill, required working hours aur market rates

questions.explanation: Labour cost mein workers ki skill set, kitne ghante kaam karna hai aur current market rates jaise factors shamil hote hain.

questions.question: Quality control ka kya matlab hai interior decoration project mein?

options.A: Sirf kaam ko jaldi khatam karna
options.B: Yeh ensure karna ki sabhi kaam specified standards aur client expectations ke according ho

questions.explanation: Quality control mein project ke har stage par kaam ki quality ko monitor karna shamil hai taaki woh client ki requirements aur industry standards ko meet kare.

questions.question: Ek professional interior decorator ko client ke saath kaise deal karna chahiye?

options.B: Respectful, transparent aur responsive rehna

questions.explanation: Professionalism mein client ke saath respectful, transparent aur responsive communication shamil hai, jo trust aur good relations banata hai.

questions.question: Project completion ke baad 'snag list' ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Chhote-mote defects ya incomplete items ko identify karna aur unhe rectify karna

questions.explanation: Snag list completion ke baad remaining minor issues ko record karti hai, jinhe rectify karna zaroori hota hai final handover se pehle.

questions.question: Contract mein kya shamil hona chahiye?

options.B: Scope of work, timeline, payment terms, aur responsibilities of both parties

questions.explanation: Contract mein project ka scope, payment schedule, timeline, aur dono parties ki responsibilities clear honi chahiye taaki koi misunderstanding na ho.

questions.question: Site par tools aur equipment ki proper maintenance kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf unko naya dikhane ke liye
options.B: उनकी कार्यक्षमता (efficiency) और जीवनकाल (lifespan) बढ़ाने, और सुरक्षा सुनिश्चित करने के लिए
options.C: Kaam ko slow karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Tools ki proper maintenance unki efficiency badhati hai, unki lifespan lambi karti hai aur unhe use karte samay safety ensure karti hai.

questions.question: Contingency fund project budget mein kyun shamil kiya jata hai?

options.B: Unexpected expenses ya delays ko cover karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Contingency fund (aakasmik nidhi) unforeseen circumstances, jaise material price hike ya unexpected repairs, ke liye rakha jata hai.

questions.question: Client ki feedback lena project completion ke baad kyun important hai?

options.B: Apni services ko improve karne aur future projects ke liye reference lene ke liye
options.C: Sirf unki tarif sunne ke liye

questions.explanation: Client feedback future projects ke liye valuable insights provide karta hai aur services ko behtar banane mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Professional ethics ka kya matlab hai interior decoration trade mein?

options.B: Honesty, integrity, fairness aur client confidentiality maintain karna
options.C: Dusre designers ke ideas copy karna

questions.explanation: Professional ethics mein honesty, integrity, client confidentiality aur fair dealing shamil hai, jo industry mein reputation banati hai.

questions.question: Project handover ke waqt client ko kya documents provide karne chahiye?

options.B: Warranties, maintenance guides, final drawings aur contact details

questions.explanation: Handover mein warranties, maintenance instructions, final drawings aur relevant contact information shamil honi chahiye taaki client ko future mein koi problem na ho.
